'''Cartann City''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Cartann]], the most powerful of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar's]] nation states. It was also the largest city on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

Cartann City had a stratified structure, with the poor workers living below ground. Its skylanes were filled with [[comm cable]]s, clustered at various altitudes with wide gaps between them so that [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] may pass through easily. After the [[Red Flight]]'s diplomatic visit and the subsequent [[Adumari Civil War|civil war]], the city was rebuilt and many of the workers living underground were given the opportunity to live above. By [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], it was the government capital of the planet.

{{City-stub}}
